untranslatable_reason: Signal requires implied volatility (IV) and historical volatility comparison, neither of which are available in the allowed indicators. Only 'hvol_20' (historical volatility) is available, but 'implied volatility' and the comparison 'below historical norms' cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. Additionally, vega risk is an options-specific greeks measure not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: This is an options strategy rule (naked puts) that requires real-time implied volatility data and options-specific risk metrics (vega). The signal fundamentally cannot be translated to price/technical action indicators. A trader would need to implement this rule outside the backtest engine using live IV data feeds.
